title: Inspection of places of business of licensed or exempted
content:
employment agencies
The Commissioner, and any public officer authorized by him in 
that behalf may—
	
(a)	
enter and inspect without a warrant at any reasonable 
time the place of business of an employment agency;
	
(b)	
require the production of, inspect, examine or take 
copies of any record or other document relating to an 
employment agency; (Amended 28 of 1992 s. 7)
Last updated date
24.8.2025
Employment Ordinance
Part XII	
12-20
Section 58	
Cap. 57
Verified Copy
	
(c)	
require any person who operates, manages or assists 
in the management of an employment agency to 
furnish such information or particulars relating to the 
employment agency as he may specify; and
	
(d)	
make such other inquiries from any other person 
connected or associated with the employment agency as 
he thinks fit.
